howItWorks.intro: This vinyl record cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Per Unit Cost = (Base + Color + Jacket) x Quantity Discount
Total Cost = (Per Unit x Quantity) + Setup Fee
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is the minimum order for vinyl pressing?
faq.answer: Most pressing plants have a minimum of 100-300 units. Some offer short runs of 50-100 at a higher per-unit cost. Standard minimum is usually 300 for the best pricing.

faq.question: How long does vinyl pressing take?
faq.answer: Typical turnaround is 12-16 weeks from approved test pressing. Rush orders (8-10 weeks) cost 20-30% more. Always factor in 2-4 weeks for test pressing approval.
